parent_friendly_description: Baby may calm when spoken to, held, or picked up.
discuss_if: If baby rarely settles with familiar caregiving and you are concerned, discuss with a healthcare provider.

parent_friendly_description: Baby watches a caregiver's face during close routines.
discuss_if: If baby does not look at faces or avoids all eye contact and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby may smile during warm face-to-face interaction.
discuss_if: If no social response is emerging and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby makes small sounds beyond crying.
discuss_if: If baby is very quiet and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby startles, quiets, or changes movement after a loud sound.
discuss_if: If baby does not react to loud sounds, ask about hearing/developmental screening.

parent_friendly_description: Baby watches as a caregiver moves nearby.
discuss_if: If baby rarely watches movement and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby focuses on a toy for a short moment.
discuss_if: If baby rarely visually attends and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_title: Lifts head during awake tummy time
parent_friendly_description: Baby raises head briefly while awake on tummy.
discuss_if: If baby cannot lift head at all during awake tummy time and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_title: Moves arms and legs on both sides
parent_friendly_description: Baby moves both arms and both legs during awake time.
discuss_if: If one side seems much weaker or less active, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby's hands sometimes open rather than staying tightly fisted.
discuss_if: If hands remain tightly closed most of the time and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby smiles to get or keep your attention.
discuss_if: If social smiles are absent and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby may chuckle when you playfully engage.
discuss_if: If baby rarely responds socially and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_title: Seeks attention with face, body, or sounds
parent_friendly_description: Baby looks, moves, or vocalizes to keep interaction going.
discuss_if: If baby rarely seeks or responds to interaction, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby makes vowel-like sounds.
discuss_if: If baby makes no vocal sounds and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby makes sounds back when you talk.
discuss_if: If baby does not respond to voice or sound, ask a provider.

parent_friendly_description: Baby turns head toward your voice.
discuss_if: If baby does not orient to voices or sounds, discuss hearing/development.

parent_friendly_description: Baby opens mouth when seeing breast or bottle if hungry.
discuss_if: If feeding cues are unclear and feeding is hard, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby looks at hands with interest.
discuss_if: If baby rarely visually explores hands/toys and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby keeps head steadier while being held.
discuss_if: If head control seems very poor for age, discuss it.

parent_title: Uses hands toward mouth or toys
parent_friendly_description: Baby brings hands to mouth, holds placed toy, or bats at toys.
discuss_if: If baby does not use hands or one hand seems much less active, discuss it.

parent_title: Pushes on forearms during tummy time
parent_friendly_description: Baby lifts chest using elbows/forearms while awake on tummy.
discuss_if: If tummy play is very difficult or baby cannot lift at all, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby responds differently to people they know well.
discuss_if: If baby does not seem to recognize familiar caregivers and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby looks at or reacts to their reflection.
discuss_if: If baby rarely attends to faces/reflections and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby laughs or shows clear enjoyment during social play.
discuss_if: If baby rarely shows enjoyment in interaction, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby and caregiver exchange sounds or pauses.
discuss_if: If baby is not making sounds or not responding to interaction and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby makes bubbly, squealing, or raspberry-like sounds.
discuss_if: If baby makes very few sounds, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby safely mouths objects to learn about them.
discuss_if: If baby does not explore objects at all and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby reaches toward an interesting object.
discuss_if: If baby does not reach for objects or one side is much weaker, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby closes mouth or turns away to show no more.
discuss_if: If feeding cues are difficult or feeding is stressful, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby can roll from tummy to back.
discuss_if: If baby never attempts rolling and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby pushes chest up with straighter arms during tummy play.
discuss_if: If baby cannot push up at all during awake tummy time, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby uses hands for support in sitting.
discuss_if: If sitting support seems unusually difficult or floppy, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby may become shy, clingy, or cautious with unfamiliar people.
discuss_if: If baby shows no recognition of familiar vs unfamiliar people and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby shows multiple expressions during the day.
discuss_if: If facial expression is very limited and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby looks or reacts when called by name.
discuss_if: If baby does not respond to name or sounds, discuss hearing/development.

parent_friendly_description: Baby looks, reaches, or cries when caregiver leaves.
discuss_if: If baby rarely responds to caregiver presence/absence and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby smiles, laughs, looks, or anticipates when you play peekaboo.
discuss_if: If baby rarely responds to social games and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby makes repeated syllable-like sound strings.
discuss_if: If baby does not babble or makes few sounds, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby lifts arms or gestures to be picked up.
discuss_if: If baby does not use gestures and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_title: Looks for dropped or hidden object
parent_friendly_description: Baby searches for object after it goes out of sight.
discuss_if: If baby does not look for disappearing objects and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby explores by banging two safe objects.
discuss_if: If baby rarely manipulates objects and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby moves into sitting independently.
discuss_if: If baby cannot sit or transition and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby moves a toy from one hand to the other.
discuss_if: If one hand is much less active or baby does not transfer, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby uses fingers to rake food toward self.
discuss_if: If feeding/finger use is difficult, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby sits without hand support for a period.
discuss_if: If baby cannot sit without support and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby joins games like clapping, peekaboo, or turn-taking routines.
discuss_if: If baby does not engage in simple social play and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby may wave or use a familiar gesture when someone leaves.
discuss_if: If baby uses no gestures and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby says or approximates a special caregiver name.
discuss_if: If baby has no sounds/words and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby pauses or stops briefly when caregiver says no.
discuss_if: If baby does not respond to voice/words and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby places an object into a cup, box, or container.
discuss_if: If baby does not explore objects functionally and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby looks for a toy hidden under cloth or container.
discuss_if: If baby does not search for hidden objects and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby pulls up using stable furniture or caregiver support.
discuss_if: If baby is not bearing weight or pulling up and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby walks while holding furniture.
discuss_if: If baby is not moving toward standing/walking and you are concerned, discuss it.

parent_friendly_description: Baby picks up small safe food with thumb and index finger.
discuss_if: If baby has difficulty using fingers or one hand, discuss it.
